associateprojectadminuser.name: AssociateProjectAdminUser
associateprojectadminuser.description: Grants permission to associate a user with the project as an administrator

createproject.name: CreateProject
createproject.description: Grants permission to create a project

createprojectuserassociation.name: CreateProjectUserAssociation
createprojectuserassociation.description: Grants permission to associate a user with the project

createuseraccessroleassociation.name: CreateUserAccessRoleAssociation
createuseraccessroleassociation.description: Grants permission to associate an access role with the user

deleteproject.name: DeleteProject
deleteproject.description: Grants permission to delete a project

deleteprojectuserassociation.name: DeleteProjectUserAssociation
deleteprojectuserassociation.description: Grants permission to disassociate a user from the project

deleteuseraccessroleassociation.name: DeleteUserAccessRoleAssociation
deleteuseraccessroleassociation.description: Grants permission to disassociate an access role from the user

disassociateprojectadminuser.name: DisassociateProjectAdminUser
disassociateprojectadminuser.description: Grants permission to disassociate an administrator from the project

getproject.name: GetProject
getproject.description: Grants permission to get information about a project

getprojectadminuser.name: GetProjectAdminUser
getprojectadminuser.description: Grants permission to describe an administrator who is associated with the project

listprojectadminusers.name: ListProjectAdminUsers
listprojectadminusers.description: Grants permission to list all administrators associated with the project

listprojectuserassociations.name: ListProjectUserAssociations
listprojectuserassociations.description: Grants permission to list all users associated with the project

listprojects.name: ListProjects
listprojects.description: Grants permission to list all projects

listtagsforresource.name: ListTagsForResource
listtagsforresource.description: Grants permission to list all tags for a resource

listuseraccessroleassociations.name: ListUserAccessRoleAssociations
listuseraccessroleassociations.description: Grants permission to list all access roles associated with the user

tagresource.name: TagResource
tagresource.description: Grants permission to tag a resource

untagresource.name: UntagResource
untagresource.description: Grants permission to untag a resource

updateproject.name: UpdateProject
updateproject.description: Grants permission to update a project
